#  [Apache Flink 0.6.1 available](</2014/09/26/apache-flink-0.6.1-available/>)

September 26, 2014 -

We are happy to announce the availability of Flink 0.6.1.

0.6.1 is a maintenance release, which includes minor fixes across several parts of the system. We suggest all users of Flink to work with this newest version.

[Download](</downloads.html>) the release today.

[Want to contribute translation?](<https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/FLINK/Flink+Translation+Specifications>)
